ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography or description of the user */,
  "device_ids" TEXT /* JSON array of device IDs the user is using */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TV series */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the TV series */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the TV series */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the TV series */,
  "year_started" INTEGER /* Year the series started */,
  "year_ended" INTEGER /* Year the series ended (if applicable) */,
  "number_of_seasons" INTEGER /* Total number of seasons in the series */,
  "number_of_episodes" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes in the series */,
  "streaming_services" TEXT /* JSON array of streaming services where the series is available */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to the series thumbnail image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watch_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watch history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who watched the series */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TV series watched */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the user started watching the series */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the user finished watching the series */,
  "episodes_watched" INTEGER /* Number of episodes watched */,
  "average_days_between_episodes" INTEGER /* Average days between episodes */,
  "seasons_watched" TEXT /* JSON array of seasons the user has watched */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User's rating for the series (1-10) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* User's notes or comments about the series */,
  "watch_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's watch history (e.g., 'watching', 'completed', 'on hold') */,
  "last_watched_episode" INTEGER /* ID of the last episode watched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TV series recommended */,
  "recommended_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "source_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the recommendation (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., 'seen', 'not seen') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_source_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)
